info.title: 15min Slovenija — Next.js REST API
info.summary: Hand-authored spec for the Next.js routes that wrap third-party services (OpenRouter LLM, Valhalla routing).
info.description:
This document covers only the **Next.js custom routes** that ship with the 15min Slovenija frontend.

The **read-only Supabase data API** (tables `cell_scores`, `amenities`, `obcine`, `protected_areas`, `amenity_isochrones`, `cell_amenities` plus the RPC functions `amenities_for_point` and `llm_search_cells`) is auto-generated by PostgREST. Its OpenAPI 2.0 spec is available at `{SUPABASE_URL}/rest/v1/` and is loaded in the **Supabase REST** tab on `/api-docs`.

All Next.js routes here use `runtime: 'nodejs'`. CORS is not exposed — these endpoints are intended for same-origin browser calls or server-to-server.

servers.description: Same-origin (the running Next.js dev server or production deployment)

tags.name: LLM
tags.description: OpenRouter-backed natural-language search and per-cell narratives.

tags.name: Valhalla
tags.description: Server-side proxy for the local/Railway Valhalla routing engine — works around Valhalla's 405-on-OPTIONS CORS preflight.

post.description:
Discriminated by the `kind` field on the request body.

**`kind: "search"`** — accepts a free-form Slovenian life scenario (e.g. *"Sva družina, oba delava v Ljubljani, otrok je v vrtcu, iščeva stanovanje blizu zelene površine"*) plus optional prior conversation turns. Calls OpenRouter to map the scenario to (a) a subset of the 8 amenity categories, (b) an optional target town, then geocodes the town via Photon, expands to an `h3.gridDisk` of ~5–7 km radius, and queries the Supabase `llm_search_cells` RPC. Returns a SL summary, a one-line filter summary, the LLM's English reasoning chain, and the top H3 cells ranked by composite score.

**`kind: "narrative"`** — returns a short Slovenian narrative for a specific cell based on its score and `walk_min[]`. Currently a deterministic stub; OpenRouter wiring planned for SLO4D.

value.query: Sva mlada družina in delava v Ljubljani in Mariboru — kje bi bilo dobro živeti?

search-with-history.summary: Search — follow-up that refines the previous answer

history.content: Družina z malim otrokom, delo v Ljubljani

200.description: OK — discriminator on `kind` in the response body.

400.description: Malformed request — body is not valid JSON, or `kind` does not match the discriminator.

422.description: Schema validation failed. `issues` carries the Zod issue list.

500.description: Upstream failure — OpenRouter non-2xx, JSON parse error, or Supabase RPC non-2xx.

501.description: `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` is not configured in the server's environment. Returned before any upstream call.

example.error: Missing OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Please set it in .env

post.summary: Proxy a request to the Valhalla routing engine
post.description:
Forwards the request body verbatim to the upstream Valhalla container (locally `http://127.0.0.1:8002`, on Railway the public URL). Exists because Valhalla returns 405 on OPTIONS preflight, which breaks direct browser-to-Valhalla CORS requests.

Whitelist of supported endpoints: `isochrone`, `route`, `locate`, `matrix`, `trace_route`. The status code and `Content-Type` from Valhalla are passed through.

Locked client speeds (set via env): `walking_speed=4 km/h` (NEXT_PUBLIC_WALKING_SPEED), `cycling_speed=13 km/h` (NEXT_PUBLIC_CYCLING_SPEED), bike profile uses `bicycle_type=Hybrid`.

parameters.name: endpoint
parameters.description: One of Valhalla's supported endpoints. Anything else returns 400.

200.description: Valhalla response, forwarded verbatim. Shape depends on the `endpoint`: a GeoJSON `FeatureCollection` for `isochrone`, a `{ trip: { legs[] } }` object for `route`, etc.

history.description: Prior conversation turns (user + assistant). Filter-summary messages should be omitted by the caller.

h3.description: H3 res-10 cell identifier (15 hex chars).

walk_min.description: Per-category walk minutes (index order matches CATEGORIES in frontend/lib/categories.ts). `null` = unreachable in 15 minutes.

filter_summary.description: One-line summary of the parsed filter (categories + area + count).

reasoning.description: LLM's step-by-step English explanation (for debugging / transparency).

top_cells.description: Top H3 cells ranked by composite score. Schema returned by the `llm_search_cells` RPC.

text_sl.description: 1–3 Slovenian sentences describing the cell's accessibility profile.

stub.description: Set to `true` while the route is returning a deterministic placeholder (no upstream LLM call yet).

details.description: Optional upstream error body (LLM or RPC).

ValhallaRequest.description: Passed through to Valhalla unchanged. See https://valhalla.github.io/valhalla/api/ for the full schema per endpoint.
